title: YouTube Starter Pack
description: A Modpack for all YouTubers and Creators alike. - Use the most popular mods that all your favorite YouTubers use with a simple click of a button!
body:
![YouTube Starter Pack - Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82a4172cb52f1a9b36acc6b141399585ac246a31_0.webp)
Have you ever wanted to be an inspiring Content Creator? But you have no idea what Mods and Shader Packs your Favorite Creators are using? Well.. This Modpack is just for you!
 
Being a Content Creator has never been this simple!
    ![YouTube Starter Pack - Linebreak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0137ef42cf112dcf21ee8e5f50b2beb92a8e855.png) ### Disclaimer [IMPORTANT]: I'm new to making Modpacks. So make sure you backup your Worlds, Configs, and other Files related to your Saves/Servers BEFORE updating to the newer versions of this Modpack. ### Key Features: 🎥 Flashback - Take your Storytelling to the next level. By creating amazing Cinematics or Timelapses for your videos. 🔍 WI Zoom - Using Zoomify you can Zoom In/Out to capture the funniest moments or zooming into your characters face for Storytelling. - Also using your Scroll Wheel you can change your Zoom Distance to enhance that specific moment. 📷 Fabrishot - Using Fabrishot you can take High-Quality Screenshots for Thumbnails or Posting them to Social Media. ⛏️ Litematica - Litematica allows you to make Schematics or Download Custom Schematics of Farms, Builds, Redstone Contraptions and many more! 🌐 Performance - While Recording your FPS and entire gameplay might slow down if you don't have a good enough PC. But with this Modpack, we've added some Performance Tweaks to help your content creation go from BAD to AMAZING! ![YouTube Starter Pack - Linebreak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0137ef42cf112dcf21ee8e5f50b2beb92a8e855.png) ### For Server Hosting _Server Modpack is still under-development. And will be released on this page once it's ready._ ![YouTube Starter Pack - Linebreak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0137ef42cf112dcf21ee8e5f50b2beb92a8e855.png)
